    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    U

    update() - Method in class model.entity.detectable.entities.Lift
    Update if the lift is moving
    update() - Method in class model.entity.Player
    Player update
    update() - Method in class model.Game
    Update the current game
    update() - Method in class model.level.LevelManager
    Update the current level and check for the level transition
    update(int[][], Player) - Method in class model.entity.enemy.entities.Robot
    Updates both the position and the atkbox
    update(Observable, Object) - Method in class view.Window
    Receive the notification from the model or navigator.
    update(Player) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.InteractableManager
    Update checks first if the current interactable is a furniture and let update the percent of the furniture if the player is interacting with it.
    update(Player) - Method in class model.entity.EntityManager
    Updates all presented managers
    update(Player, int[][], Optional) - Method in class model.entity.enemy.entities.Ball
    Updates the position and the atkbox if isn't destroyed
    update(Player, Optional) - Method in class model.entity.enemy.EnemyManager
    Update the robots movement and checks if the Player is in the their atkbox so they can kill
    update(Player, Optional) - Method in class model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
    Updates the lifts if they're moving, pushing the Player and the Ball if is in the way
    updateDeathTime() - Method in class model.Play
    Update the timer when the player is dead
    updateLeaderboard(Leaderboard) - Method in class view.panel.SettingsPanel
    Updates the text of the Leaderboard
    updatePercent() - Method in class model.entity.detectable.entities.Furniture
    Updates the percent, reducing it until it reaches 0 only if the furniture is currently getting interacted
    updateProfile(Game, Profile) - Method in class view.panel.ProfilePanel
    Updates the profile datas once it change profile
    updateResult(Game, Play.PlayState) - Method in class view.panel.ResultPanel
    Updates the text to represents the passes and points that the player got in the game + leaderboard
    updateSounds() - Method in class view.panel.PlayPanel
    Plays automatically sounds, thanks to AudioManager, depending on the situation in the game
    updateTime() - Method in class model.Play
    Update the timer of the game
    useReset() - Method in class model.entity.Player
     
    useSleep() - Method in class model.entity.Player
